name: 揭露型——真相炸彈
description: 用簡短直接的語句揭露隱藏的秘密，通常包含證據展示。節奏快、資訊密度高，讓被揭露者無法辯駁。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: I know that Michelle didn't kill your baby. I know that you went to the doctor and got abortion pills earlier that day. ... I trusted you. I defended you. I believed your word over my own wife. You betrayed me.

examples.drama_title: 全家偏愛養女，她過得不如寵物狗，重生後她果斷斷親，嫁給愛她的CEO，從此被護在懷裡，寵成寶 #灰姑娘霸總 #狗血 #好看 #繼承者
examples.excerpt: The pen pal you're looking for is not Shen Nuo at all, but Shen Ruo. ... Shen Ruo has been occupying his name and refused to give it back. So, we were forced to change his name.
